name: weather
description: 查询指定城市的天气信息
capabilities: Query current weather conditions for major Chinese cities including Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen, and Hangzhou
Retrieve temperature data in Celsius for specified locations
Get weather status information such as sunny, cloudy, or rainy conditions
Check humidity percentage for queried cities
Understand natural language weather queries in both Chinese and English
author: AI Creator
securitySummary: This skill contains only documentation files with no executable code. All 22 static findings are false positives: backticks are markdown formatting, URLs are legitimate API documentation references, and high entropy is due to Chinese characters. No security risks identified.
valueStatement: This skill helps users check weather conditions for cities using conversational queries. It provides temperature, conditions, and humidity data through simple natural language requests.
userTitle: Query Weather Data with Natural Language
limitations: Currently provides simulated weather data rather than real-time API integration
Limited to a predefined list of major Chinese cities for accurate data
Does not include extended forecasts beyond current conditions
Historical weather data queries are not fully implemented

useCases.title: Daily Weather Check
useCases.description: Users can quickly ask about current weather conditions before leaving home or planning outdoor activities.

useCases.title: Travel Planning Assistant
useCases.description: Travelers can check weather conditions for destination cities to pack appropriate clothing and plan activities.

useCases.title: Business Meeting Preparation
useCases.description: Business professionals can verify weather conditions in cities where they have meetings or conferences scheduled.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Weather Query
promptTemplates.prompt: What is the weather in Beijing?
promptTemplates.scenario: Simple current weather check for a single city

promptTemplates.title: Comparative Weather Query
promptTemplates.prompt: Compare the weather between Shanghai and Guangzhou today
promptTemplates.scenario: Checking weather differences between multiple cities

promptTemplates.title: Detailed Weather Information
promptTemplates.prompt: Tell me the temperature, humidity, and weather conditions in Shenzhen
promptTemplates.scenario: Requesting comprehensive weather details for trip planning

promptTemplates.title: Weather for Activity Planning
promptTemplates.prompt: Is it suitable for outdoor activities in Hangzhou based on current weather?
promptTemplates.scenario: Getting weather recommendations for specific activities

bestPractices: Specify city names clearly to ensure accurate weather information retrieval
Use natural language queries as the skill is designed to understand conversational requests
Check weather information shortly before making plans as conditions can change throughout the day
antiPatterns: Avoid requesting weather data for cities outside the supported list expecting real-time accuracy
Do not rely on this skill for critical weather-dependent decisions without verifying with official sources
Avoid asking for extended multi-day forecasts as the skill focuses on current conditions

faq.question: Which cities are supported for weather queries?
faq.answer: The skill primarily supports major Chinese cities including Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen, and Hangzhou. Other cities will return simulated data based on geographic location and season.

faq.question: Does this skill provide real-time weather data?
faq.answer: Currently the skill uses simulated weather data. Integration with real weather APIs like OpenWeatherMap or WeatherAPI is planned for future versions.

faq.question: Can I query weather for dates in the past or future?
faq.answer: The skill documentation mentions date-based queries, but this functionality is not fully implemented in the current version. The focus is on current weather conditions.

faq.question: What weather information does the skill provide?
faq.answer: The skill returns temperature in Celsius, weather conditions such as sunny or rainy, and humidity percentage for the queried city.

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: No API key is required for the current version as it uses simulated data. Future versions with real API integration will require API credentials.

faq.question: Can I query weather in English or only Chinese?
faq.answer: While the documentation is primarily in Chinese, the skill understands weather queries in both Chinese and English languages.
